docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF OKHVAT, SERGEY AS TO DEFENDANT VECTO INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OKHVAT, SERGEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VECTO INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $12,942.92 PRINCIPAL, $5,516.48 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,829.40, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
